title: cassia papillosa
intro: Cassia papillosa, also known as the hairy cassia or Indian laburnum, is a flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cassia papillosa are said to include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Cassia papillosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
